name: Shrimp De Jonghe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut oil, coconut flakes, bread crumbs, parsley, paprika, cayenne, salt, and minced garlic in a large bowl.
2. Reserve 1/4 cup of this mixture for topping later.
3. Lightly coat the shelled and deveined shrimp with the remaining mixture until evenly coated.
4. Transfer the shrimp to an oiled baking dish.
5. Pour the sherry over the shrimp.
6. Sprinkle the reserved breadcrumb mixture over the top of the shrimp.
7. Bake, uncovered, in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 40 minutes, or until the shrimp are tender.
